plugins.name: handbook
plugins.description: Core Claude Code handbook with best practices and essential tools

plugins.name: handbook-extras
plugins.description: Extended features and experimental tools for Claude Code Handbook

plugins.name: handbook-qa
plugins.description: Browser automation and QA testing tools with Playwright MCP integration

plugins.name: handbook-dotnet
plugins.description: .NET development tools including CSharpier formatting, dotnet run file support, selective unit testing, and dependency investigation

plugins.name: handbook-microsoft-docs
plugins.description: Microsoft Learn MCP server for searching and fetching official Microsoft and Azure documentation

plugins.name: handbook-context7
plugins.description: Context7 MCP server for fetching latest library documentation from official sources

plugins.name: handbook-sounds
plugins.description: Audio feedback for Claude Code events on Windows using PowerShell sounds

plugins.name: handbook-git-worktree
plugins.description: Git worktree management for working on multiple branches simultaneously

plugins.name: handbook-structured-plan-mode
plugins.description: Structured planning methodology for complex feature implementations through systematic task decomposition

plugins.name: handbook-agent-spec-kit
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow system with structured phases: Requirements → Design → Tasks → Implementation

plugins.name: handbook-nano-banana
plugins.description: Python scripting and Gemini image generation using uv with inline script dependencies

plugins.name: handbook-glab
plugins.description: GitLab CLI (glab) expertise for managing merge requests, issues, CI/CD pipelines, and repositories

plugins.name: handbook-csharp-lsp
plugins.description: C# Language Server Protocol support using csharp-ls for code intelligence features

plugins.name: handbook-elasticsearch
plugins.description: Elasticsearch and Kibana REST API expertise for querying, indexing, managing indices, cluster health, aggregations, ES|QL, and dashboard deployment

plugins.name: handbook-code-review
plugins.description: Code review plugin with two strategies: disposable subagents for one-shot reviews and persistent team members for iterative reviews

plugins.name: handbook-discover
plugins.description: Discover and audit all plugins in a Claude Code marketplace with installation status, versions, and component breakdown

plugins.name: handbook-team-stack
plugins.description: Interactive skill that analyzes a task, proposes an agent team composition with roles and responsibilities, and creates the team after user confirmation
